info.name: MH4U Database API
info.description: A public, read-only REST API for the Monster Hunter 4 Ultimate game database: monsters, weapons, armor, items, quests, locations, skills and more. Responses are cached and rate-limited; pass ?lang=de|fr|es|it|jp to localize names.

item.name: Armor
item.description: Armor pieces by slot, with defense, resistances and granted skills.

query.description: Sort by defense or max_defense (prefix - to reverse).
Filter by slot: Head, Body, Arms, Waist, Legs.
Filter by hunter type: Blade, Gunner, Both.
